horoscope: Early today, there can be a tendency for others to misinterpret what you're saying or for you to misrepresent your feelings, dear Aries. There can be tricky or somewhat touchy interactions right now, and relationships might require extra attention to keep things running up to par. Communications can lead to more question marks. Fortunately, the day advances with a desire to heal and repair. Venus and Chiron align in your sign, and you might discover that the path to empowerment is through helping others. The more you open your heart and accept, the better life gets. Your ability to heal and understand is high, and this may be attracting others to you today. Personal confidence is about letting go of worrying about what others expect of you and simply expressing yourself naturally. Your unique style shines now, even if you do not mean to attract attention to it.

There can be some sensitivity to the finer points of communication in the first half of the day, dear Taurus, and treading with care may be wise. It may be better to play a supportive role by listening, observing, and helping. Still, as the day advances, misunderstandings can more readily turn into learning experiences. Venus aligns with Chiron, prompting a strong urge to heal and move on. There can be a trigger or other potent reminder of an open wound, such as something from your past for which you didn't receive closure. Self-honesty now can open you up to opportunities to heal. The inner teacher in you emerges, and you have tremendous insight and experience to share with those willing to listen. Your own experiences have taught you much, and you could be helping others with similar problems. You have the chance to better understand what and who is most valuable to you. This can benefit your relationships with yourself and a special person in your life, as well as your financial or practical worlds.

There is some tendency to overlook the emotional component of your interactions in your excitement on a mental level early today, dear Gemini. Differences of opinion seem a little easier to take if you approach them from a mental plane rather than an emotional one. Still, this energy completely turns around as the day advances, and you're more likely to deal with matters heart-on! Self-honesty can open doors for you. More appreciation can be shown for you, as people value your friendship, input, and company more than usual. You might reach a new level of understanding or awareness, or recognize ways to rejuvenate a connection. There is magic in honesty with Venus and Chiron coming into alignment, even if it doesn't feel that way initially. As you seek emotional satisfaction and wholeness, people in your life or even in your networks can lead you in the right direction. It's a time for exciting personal discoveries. Emotionally, you are brave and willing, particularly in your social life.

Generally speaking, your ideas are big these days, dear Cancer, but whether or not they will come to be, the important thing is that you're feeling inspired and allowing new ideas to flow. It's a time to stretch your mind and entertain new perspectives. In the first half of the day, people can be sensitive and indirect in their approach, and conversations may not go as you intend as a result. It's best to avoid jumping to conclusions or speaking about a matter prematurely. However, as the day advances, opportunities to grow, learn, and heal emerge as Venus and Chiron align. It's also a good time for recognizing the need to improve and grow in your business pursuits. A humble approach does wonders for your professional life and reputation now. At the same time, your willingness to think outside of the box can be invaluable.

While it's a generally good time for solving a mystery, investigating, and understanding a relationship or your finances, dear Leo, you can have some difficulty getting your message across well in the first half of the day. Others can be more sensitive than usual, possibly feeling slighted or overly focused on words rather than the intentions behind them. Watch for over-analyzing or intellectualizing your feelings in a way that misrepresents you. As the day advances, with Venus and Chiron aligning in your solar ninth house, you gravitate to things that need to improve, grow, and develop. People around you can be catalysts for relating and connecting more openly and confidently. Opening your heart creates opportunities to heal and resolve problems. There can be a willingness to learn from one another and learn from past mistakes.

In the first half of the day, dear Virgo, there's some tendency to overstate or spend too much time in our heads. Choosing your words carefully to avoid misunderstandings is wise. Feelings and logic tend to mix in all the wrong ways right now, and this can mean speaking too emotionally or relating too intellectually or logically. You may not be in close touch with how you truly feel, so it's better not to try to explain your feelings until you truly know what they are. However, with Venus and Chiron coming together in your solar eighth house as the day advances, the chance to really dig deep and get to the heart of a relationship or private matter can arise. It's a time for emotional repair, healing, and deep understanding. It's also a fine time for discovering what or who you value, and for research and analysis, with an extra dose of intuition on your side. Emotional honesty is important now, and fortunately, it comes more easily than usual. You are courageous but also very sensitive to new discoveries, as they seem to touch a soft spot. In fact, you may be going straight to that soft spot, since the desire to repair is strong.

You can feel a strong need to help or support others with information you've gathered for them, dear Libra, or with your advice. Watch, however, for arriving at a conclusion too quickly. There can be some discrepancy between true feelings and what is actually communicated early today, so do your best to avoid putting too much weight in communications that seem a little off. As the day advances, you open up considerably, and emotional matters thrive. Even so, an old wound may reopen in the process! Venus in your partnership sector aligns with wise Chiron, bringing a relationship matter or sensitivity to your attention. You are open and generous, and others are drawn to you through these qualities. You may be helping someone through a difficulty or vice versa. It can be a good time to recommit to a healing process, relationship, or improved attitude related to relationships.

In the first half of the day, it may be best to avoid off-the-cuff remarks, dear Scorpio, as you could say something that misrepresents what you feel in your heart. However, the day advances with more smoothness. You're open and generous, and you radiate healing energy. There can be a new beginning with someone or the chance to start fresh with a positive attitude. Others may be turning to you for help, support, or advice, and you are particularly willing to come to their aid. The desire is to be of practical help above all. You are also particularly interested in your own health and work. There can be a strong attraction to alternative ways to heal and strengthen yourself. If bad habits or health have been a problem recently, this can be a time of increased sensitivity to imbalances and a high drive to make improvements.

There is some tendency to take things the wrong way early today, dear Sagittarius, but you can rise above it. Words selected to communicate feelings may not be perfect, and it's best to keep this in mind whether you're crafting a speech or on the receiving end. There may be some temptation to gloss over issues just to avoid unpleasantness. However, the day advances with a greater desire to heal than for comfort! Today's Venus-Chiron alignment stirs more willingness to be vulnerable, which can help enhance sharing with a friend or love interest. An open approach leads to opportunities for a fresh start. It may even be a time to make resolutions or reach a turning point in a relationship regarding forgiveness and understanding. If you're not in a position to spend time with someone, consider expressing yourself through creative outlets. Finding release through fantasy or imaginative pursuits can figure strongly and be quite rewarding.

There is some tendency to trip over words in the first half of the day, dear Capricorn. You may be focusing on the words rather than the human element, which can lead to hurt feelings. This tendency turns around completely as the day advances and Venus and Chiron form an alignment. It becomes an excellent time for a new beginning or a refreshing moment with family or in your private life. Matters that are usually tricky may be easier to confront with this aspect forming at the bottom of your solar chart in your sector of home and family. You or people around you are all the more psychically open, and feelings that may normally be hard to access can emerge with greater ease. While the need to belong and feel nurtured can be a soft spot right now with Chiron in this area of your chart, identifying and facing this helps move you toward possible solutions.

You can feel a bit indulgent in the first part of the day, dear Aquarius, as part of you wants to smooth over differences and keep the peace. However, there can be some missteps or misunderstandings to manage. There can be a feeling that others are not telling you the full story, and it's probably the case, but it may simply be due to indecision or a lack of being in touch with how they truly feel. The day advances with more desire to heal, and you can put the avoidant tendencies behind you. It becomes a strong time for detoxing and releasing negative energy. You're in a great position to take steps toward securing or improving a basic area of your life. It's a fine time to resolve to let go of a mental burden. Open, sensitive, humble, and fresh communications can lead to bonding and connecting with others. Talking opens up doors, and others might enjoy your words of wisdom even more than usual. Even though there is increased sensitivity as well, with openness, healing becomes possible and even likely. There can be a new beginning in a relationship, a learning program, or a personal interest.

You may not be very disciplined in the first part of the day, dear Pisces. Attempts to express your feelings can go a little wrong if you're not connecting with your true feelings on a matter, which is highly likely right now. Distractions can make it difficult to keep up or to do your best. Social or emotional concerns don't mix well with more practical and logical affairs right now. However, this energy reverses as the day progresses. The day becomes quite excellent for identifying what you truly want and value, which applies to both relationships and the material world, benefiting financial planning, purchases, and new awareness in a relationship. You can benefit greatly from natural or earthy activities that renew your connection to the world around you or the world of the five senses. These can, in fact, be healing. If you're feeling especially sensitive about your worth or value to others, deal with this bravely -- the day favors openness and self-honesty.
